name: Professional Stainless Steel Chef's Knife
description: High-quality 8-inch chef's knife made from German stainless steel with a sharp, durable blade. Features an ergonomic handle with a comfortable grip. Perfect for chopping, slicing, and dicing vegetables, fruits, and meats. Includes a protective blade cover.

name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and superior sound quality. Includes Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity, touch controls, and a carrying case. Comfortable over-ear design suitable for extended listening sessions.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Executive ergonomic office chair with lumbar support, adjustable armrests, and tilt mechanism. Features breathable mesh back, height adjustable seat, and smooth-rolling casters. Ideal for long work hours with maximum comfort and support.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-walled insulated stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours. Lightweight and durable with a leak-proof cap. Available in multiple colors. Perfect for gym, office, or outdoor activities.

name: Portable Phone Charger 20000mAh
description: High-capacity portable power bank with 20000mAh battery. Supports fast charging with dual USB ports and USB-C input. LED display shows remaining battery percentage. Compact design fits easily in a backpack or pocket.

name: Yoga Mat Premium Non-Slip
description: Premium 6mm thick yoga mat with non-slip surface on both sides. Made from eco-friendly TPE material. Includes carrying strap and alignment marks for proper posture. Ideal for yoga, pilates, and floor exercises.

name: LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging
description: Modern LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness and color temperature. Features built-in USB charging port for devices. Touch control panel with memory function. Energy-efficient and reduces eye strain.

name: Stainless Steel Cookware Set 10-Piece
description: Complete 10-piece cookware set including pots, pans, and lids. Made from heavy-gauge stainless steel with aluminum-core bottoms for even heat distribution. Oven-safe up to 500°F. Includes glass lids and stay-cool handles.

name: Mechanical Keyboard RGB Gaming
description: Professional mechanical gaming keyboard with RGB backlighting and programmable keys. Features cherry MX switches for responsive gameplay. Detachable USB-C cable and aluminum frame construction.

name: Bamboo Cutting Board Set 3-Piece
description: Set of three bamboo cutting boards in different sizes. Eco-friendly, durable, and naturally antibacterial. Includes juice grooves for easy cleanup. Perfect for vegetables, fruits, and meats.

name: Wireless Mouse with Precision Tracking
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with precision optical tracking and adjustable DPI settings. Quiet click technology reduces noise. 18-month battery life. Compatible with Windows and Mac systems.

name: Stainless Steel Thermos Flask 1L
description: Large capacity 1-liter stainless steel thermos with vacuum insulation. Keeps beverages hot for 12 hours or cold for 24 hours. Wide mouth opening for easy filling and cleaning. Durable screw-top lid.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set 5-50 lbs
description: Complete adjustable dumbbell set with weight range from 5 to 50 pounds. Features quick-change mechanism for easy weight adjustment. Includes storage rack and workout guide. Ideal for home gym setup.

name: USB-C Fast Charging Cable 2-Pack
description: Two high-quality USB-C charging cables with fast charging support. Compatible with all USB-C devices. Durable braided nylon exterior resists fraying. 6-foot length for convenient reach.

name: Bamboo Desk Organizer with Drawer
description: Eco-friendly bamboo desk organizer with multiple compartments and a sliding drawer. Perfect for storing pens, pencils, and small office supplies. Minimalist design complements any workspace. Sustainable and durable.

name: Ceramic Non-Stick Frying Pan 12-inch
description: Large 12-inch ceramic non-stick frying pan with reinforced coating. Oven-safe up to 400°F. Ergonomic handle with heat-resistant silicone grip. Suitable for all cooktops including induction.

name: Compact Travel Pillow Memory Foam
description: Lightweight memory foam travel pillow with removable washable cover. Provides neck support during flights and long journeys. Compresses to small size for easy packing. Hypoallergenic and breathable material.

name: Stainless Steel Measuring Cup Set 4-Piece
description: Set of four stainless steel measuring cups with clear measurement markings. Includes 1/4, 1/3, 1/2, and 1 cup sizes. Durable construction with comfortable handles. Easy to read and clean.

name: Digital Bathroom Scale with Body Analysis
description: Smart digital bathroom scale with body composition analysis including weight, BMI, body fat percentage, and muscle mass. Bluetooth connectivity syncs with fitness apps. Measures up to 400 lbs with 0.1 lb accuracy.

name: Canvas Tote Bag with Zipper
description: Durable canvas tote bag with sturdy handles and interior zipper pocket. Spacious main compartment perfect for shopping, work, or travel. Eco-friendly material and reinforced stitching. Available in multiple colors.

name: Stainless Steel Food Storage Containers Set
description: Set of five stainless steel airtight food storage containers with locking lids. BPA-free and leak-proof design. Suitable for both refrigerator and freezer storage. Easy to stack and clean.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker Waterproof
description: Compact waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound. IPX7 water-resistant rating perfect for pool, beach, or shower use. 12-hour battery life and built-in microphone for calls. Rugged design with carrying strap.

name: Adjustable Monitor Stand Riser
description: Adjustable monitor stand with height and angle customization. Supports monitors up to 32 inches and 15 kg. Includes storage shelf underneath for keyboard and accessories. Reduces neck and eye strain.

name: Silicone Baking Mat Set 2-Pack
description: Two non-stick silicone baking mats with temperature range from -40°F to 480°F. Reusable and eco-friendly alternative to parchment paper. Easy to clean and dishwasher safe. Perfect for cookies, pastries, and roasted vegetables.

name: Premium Bamboo Cutting Board with Handle
description: Large premium bamboo cutting board with integrated handle and juice groove. Naturally antibacterial and eco-friendly. Perfect for meal prep and entertaining. Includes care instructions for longevity.
